channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DSFCL] Madhav Bansidhar Shriram Acquires 5.34% Stake in DCM Shriram Fine Chemicals Ltd
item.description:
According to a disclosure made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Madhav Bansidhar Shriram has acquired a significant stake in DCM Shriram Fine Chemicals Ltd. The acquisition details are as follows: Before the acquisition, Madhav Bansidhar Shriram held 4.94% shares of the company. Post-acquisition, his holding has increased to 10.28%. The total shares of the company remain the same at 86992185. The acquisition was made off-market on 19th March 2026. Madhav Bansidhar Shriram and associates now hold a total of 13.83% shares in the company.

  • Madhav Bansidhar Shriram acquires 5.34% stake in DCM Shriram Fine Chemicals Ltd
  • Acquisition made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • Total shares of the company remain the same at 86992185
  • Acquisition made off-market on 19th March 2026
  • Madhav Bansidhar Shriram and associates now hold 13.83% shares in the company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DCM Shriram Fine Chemicals Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [IGARASHI] Igarashi Motors India Ltd Closes Trading Window for FY 2025-2026 Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Igarashi Motors India Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure will be effective from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the conclusion of the Board Meeting to consider the Audited Financial Results for the FY ending on March 31, 2026. This action is pursuant to the provisions under Regulation 29 and Regulation 47 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Designated persons and their immediate relatives have been advised not to trade in the company's equity shares during this period.

  • Igarashi Motors India Ltd closes trading window for FY 2025-2026 audited financial results
  • Closure effective from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the Board Meeting
  • Action taken in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Designated persons and their immediate relatives advised not to trade during the closure period
  • Board Meeting date to consider the Audited Financial Results yet to be announced

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IGARASHI MOTORS INDIA LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ACTIVE] Stellant Securities Acquires 10,00,000 Fully Convertible Warrants in Active Clothing Co Ltd
item.description:
Stellant Securities (India) Limited, along with Mr. Subhash Phootarmal Rathod and Mrs. Mangala Subhash Rathod, have acquired 10,00,000 fully convertible warrants representing 9.10% of the fully diluted post-issue paid-up equity share capital of Active Clothing Co. Ltd. The warrants were acquired on March 19, 2026, pursuant to a preferential allotment made by the Target Company.

  • Stellant Securities, Subhash Phootarmal Rathod, and Mangala Subhash Rathod have acquired 10,00,000 fully convertible warrants in Active Clothing Co Ltd.
  • The warrants represent 9.10% of the fully diluted post-issue paid-up equity share capital of Active Clothing Co Ltd.
  • The acquisition was made on March 19, 2026, pursuant to a preferential allotment by the Target Company.
  • The warrants entitle the acquirers to receive shares carrying voting rights in Active Clothing Co Ltd.
  • The acquisition is categorized as an investment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Active Clothing Co Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [SINCLAIR] Navin Chand Suchanti Acquires 0.11% Shares in Sinclairs Hotels Ltd via Open Market
item.description:
Navin Chand Suchanti, a Promoter of Sinclairs Hotels Ltd, has acquired 53,968 shares carrying voting rights of the company. This represents 0.11% of the total voting rights of the company. The acquisition was made via the open market between 17th and 18th March 2026. After the acquisition, Navin Chand Suchanti now holds 6.22% of the total voting rights in the company. The total equity share capital and total voting capital of the company remains unchanged at 5,12,60,000 equity shares of Rs.2 each.

  • Navin Chand Suchanti, a Promoter of Sinclairs Hotels Ltd, has acquired 0.11% shares of the company via the open market.
  • The acquisition was made between 17th and 18th March 2026.
  • After the acquisition, Navin Chand Suchanti now holds 6.22% of the total voting rights in the company.
  • The total equity share capital and total voting capital of the company remains unchanged.
  • The acquisition was made in compliance with the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SINCLAIRS HOTELS LTD.-$ | Category: Deals

item.title: [DEVIT] Xduce Technologies Pvt Ltd Acquires Majority Stake in Dev Information Technology Ltd
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Xduce Technologies Pvt Ltd has acquired a significant stake in Dev Information Technology Ltd, as per the disclosures received under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The acquisition was made through the open market on 17th March 2026. The total share capital of Dev Information Technology Ltd is 11,26,70,464 Equity Shares of Rs. 2/- each, and Xduce Technologies Pvt Ltd now holds 23.69% of the total share capital post-acquisition.

  • Xduce Technologies Pvt Ltd acquires a significant stake in Dev Information Technology Ltd
  • Acquisition made through the open market
  • Total share capital of Dev Information Technology Ltd is 11,26,70,464 Equity Shares of Rs. 2/- each
  • Xduce Technologies Pvt Ltd now holds 23.69% of the total share capital post-acquisition
  • Transaction date is 17th March 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dev Information Technology Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [DCMSIL] Madhav Bansidhar Shriram Acquires 5.34% Stake in DCM Shriram International Ltd
item.description:
According to a disclosure made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Madhav Bansidhar Shriram has acquired a 5.34% stake in DCM Shriram International Ltd. The acquisition was made off-market on 19th March 2026. The total share capital of the company remains unchanged at 86992185 equity shares after the acquisition.

  • Madhav Bansidhar Shriram acquires 5.34% stake in DCM Shriram International Ltd
  • The acquisition was made off-market on 19th March 2026
  • The total share capital of the company remains unchanged at 86992185 equity shares after the acquisition

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DCM Shriram International Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [AUROPHARMA] Aurobindo Pharma Subsidiary's Unit-V Classified as VAI by US FDA
item.description:
Aurobindo Pharma Ltd. has announced that Unit-V of Apitoria Pharma Private Limited, its wholly owned subsidiary, has been classified as 'Voluntary Action Indicated' (VAI) by the US FDA. The US FDA inspected the API manufacturing facility in Telangana from December 01 to December 12, 2025, and issued a 'Form 483' with 03 observations. Post the inspection, the facility received an Establishment Inspection Report (EIR), classifying it as VAI, and the inspection is now 'closed'.

  • Aurobindo Pharma's subsidiary's Unit-V classified as VAI by US FDA
  • US FDA inspected the facility from December 01 to December 12, 2025
  • 03 observations were made in the Form 483
  • Establishment Inspection Report (EIR) classifies the facility as VAI
  • The inspection is now 'closed'

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AUROBINDO PHARMA LTD. | Category: USFDA

item.title: [SCTL] Nilmesh Infrabuild LLP Acquires Significant Shares in Suncare Traders Ltd
item.description:
According to a disclosure made under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Nilmesh Infrabuild LLP has acquired shares in Suncare Traders Ltd. The acquisition was made for a total of Rs. 51,00,00,000, which is divided into 25,50,00,000 Equity shares of the company, each valued at 2/-. The shares were acquired through an inter-se transfer, and no encumbrance was involved. This acquisition increases Nilmesh Infrabuild LLP's holding in Suncare Traders Ltd, with the specifics yet to be disclosed.

  • Nilmesh Infrabuild LLP acquires shares in Suncare Traders Ltd
  • Acquisition worth Rs. 51,00,00,000
  • 25,50,00,000 Equity shares acquired
  • Shares acquired through inter-se transfer
  • No encumbrance involved in the acquisition

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Suncare Traders Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [EMPIND] Empire Industries Ltd Restricts Trading of Shares Until March 2026
item.description:
Empire Industries Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for promoters, directors, and designated persons from 1st March 2023 until 31st March 2026. This restriction applies to the trading of the company's shares in accordance with the SEBI regulations and company codes.

  • Empire Industries Ltd has closed the trading window for promoters, directors, and designated persons.
  • The trading restriction will be in effect from 1st March 2023 to 31st March 2026.
  • This decision is in accordance with the SEBI regulations and company codes.
  • The restriction applies to the trading of the company's shares.
  • The announcement was made via a circular to the BSE.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EMPIRE INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Trading Restriction

item.title: [SOMANYCERA] Shrivatsa Somany Acquires Shares of Somany Ceramics Ltd
item.description:
Shrivatsa Somany, a Promoter/Promoter group of Somany Ceramics Ltd, has acquired shares of the company. The acquisition was made through Concert (PAC) with the acquirer. The total number of shares acquired by Shrivatsa Somany is 640, which is 0.00% of the total shares of the company. This acquisition increases Shrivatsa Somany's total holding to 1,20,527 shares, which is 0.29% of the total shares of the company.

  • Shrivatsa Somany, a Promoter/Promoter group of Somany Ceramics Ltd, has acquired shares of the company
  • The acquisition was made through Concert (PAC) with the acquirer
  • The total number of shares acquired by Shrivatsa Somany is 640
  • This acquisition increases Shrivatsa Somany's total holding to 1,20,527 shares
  • The total number of shares of the company is 4,10,12,806

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SOMANY CERAMICS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions
